A couple of days later he returned with ‘the boss’ Dan Perpeluk, owner of Best On Top Roofing, taking measurements and more photos with his drone. The two of them sat with us, explained the reroofing process and options, and clearly answered all our questions and addressed our concerns.

We had three priorities.
1) A high quality roof we could depend on to protect us from west coast rain and wind.
The GAF High Performance Roofing System and warranties is what we needed.
2) Experienced, professional installers, that take pride in their work.
The Maximum Roofing team of Adrian and Jason worked to the highest standards.
3) Completion before Marie’s knee replacement July 30th.
Despite a challenging July heat wave, the job was completed on schedule July 26th!

You met all of our priorities.
You kept all of your promises.
The finished product is superb and we are delighted.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChoqRuEzB1mpcJ8cnMAtmj&fid=0x0:0xc2c3c9e303d9ae3"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"mookamoose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaKK83q2fyCqkv2KUMkDttzYaaTCzrIorEbT46jg7xztlObiE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dan and his team were recommended to me and I am SO glad they were !!! They cleaned everything up immaculately!!!  My house looks brand new !!! I have been telling Everyone I know about them !!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCEwqpXfAXsOw2690YpT4Le&fid=0x0:0xc2c3c9e303d9ae3"],"When":"2025-6-25"},{"Name":"Philip P (DjFIL007)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQWEPz2JwE3w0hGi-N7YTK26jWVME6axOsrQ0oVC80MK9QPNw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Previously posted as a 5-star review, now revised due to multiple after-install concerns that have come up. I still will stand by the high quality materials that was used during the install and the original install project was completed in a timely fashion. However... there was concerns found that delayed warranty certification, week or so later they sent someone back early morning with ZERO WARNING they're up on our roof again, opening a skylight they never installed properly and other small items noticed. Company owner tells me the person HE SENT to review the work exaggerates issues frequently... and few weeks later we get another half day of work to finish the job. We did eventually get the warranty certificate, but all the information on it (even the basic address) was incorrect. Multiple attempts to get replies and have this corrected, it feels like we're being ghosted. For a company who's sales pitch stated they'd be there not just before and during the work, but also after, they're falling short of the expectations of their premium priced service and product.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rick Hyne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBy9MjDhIRDWov5r7I8DhuGupno-riXDFcvegb0Yf6nazkR0XVMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Last year we called around and received quotes from three roofing companies but decided not to move forward.

This year we returned to those companies for a requote, but none of them called back.

Then we called Best on Top Roofing.  The response was immediate.

Three week later we had their crew on our roof not only replacing our shingles, but repaired/replaced our sheathing due to years of leaking.

The crew had many, many years of experience and did what needed to be done to make it a great install.

We even had our shed redone to match the roof.

The final bill was as proposed. No "didn't you know" add-ons.

Great job guys.,","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDK0JrzGw&fid=0x0:0xc2c3c9e303d9ae3"],"When":"2021-4-27"},{"Name":"Vladimir Grigore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl8UCLup4DxxReFhw-kI8BP-n27uTpN13HVgtlNSSErbycvXrx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Best on Top is the most successful roofing company in the Nanaimo area, and sometimes success comes at a cost, as the overhead to manage several teams working across different projects at the same time can lead to challenges in managing timelines and communication with the end customer. He came by the following day to give me a quote and explained the scope of his work. Him and his crew showed up one day later and replaced the roof. A new skylight was ordered and will be installed once it arrives.
James was great to deal with and did exactly what he said he would; him and his crew showed up on time, completed the work and cleaned up after themselves. They did a great job!
I would absolutely recommend Else Roofing to anyone who's looking for a reliable, skilled, hard-working and friendly bunch of guys and girls.
Thank you so much!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNhNQ0lyy0HMVyrLoXKfa3gdupUdG6A1Hh2xI5fbzH9vbceA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I hired James and his crew and he is innovative, upfront and honest. At the time of the work I had my windows replaced as well. My hydro bill went from $700-$900 per cycle (I know right?!?) to our largest bill was $250-ish.
I am pleased with the company and if I move (I won't) I would use them again as they are all reasonable and listened to my complaints when I had them.
To top it off, my place looks amazing and the energy savings is noticeable.
Trying to attach before and after pictures. If it doesn't work, and Ideal Siding did take them, they should post them as my home looks amazing.

Erickson Roofing was responsive and professional at every step of the way, and we were very happy with our choice of roofers. We would definitely recommend them!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nic N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLSSqGFoLRDTKDBiOZF2gd5qzaZBXxh-xeT98qlqStZ5jb4tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We needed our entire roof replaced, as well as my gutters. Through word of mouth, Erickson Roofing was recommended, so we decided to contact them.
Yanick is very professional and dedicated. He was always quick to respond if we had any questions or concerns and kept me updated on things. We wanted to replace my workshop roof as well, but he recommended waiting 10 years, as that roof is newer than the roof on my home. We were very impressed!
Roofer Murray and his team did an outstanding job. They replaced 20 pieces of plywood and explained why the original plywood rotted. The cleanup after each workday was outstanding as well. New roof and gutters are absolutely stunning, and fully functional. This is a top notch, top quality roofing company. Keep in mind, that due to COVID, suppliers are running behind on inventory, so you may have to wait a little while for certain items. This is not the fault of the roofing company.
Thank you Erickson Roofing, for helping my family and I.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Wood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKp71uSKH-0JEfoaztM5JJdwbyHnOYrfnYycVIAYnN7IaucmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I contacted Erickson Roofing to replace our roof. We were very happy with the price and from my favourable experience 20 years ago, did not bother to get another estimate. We were made aware that there would be a slight delay in starting due to supply issues as a result of Covid. Murray and Dakota were the main roofers for our job and were both excellent. Everything in the process was well communicated and they all did and excellent job with our new roof.
We are extremely pleased with the final result. There were no surprises and I am still as happy with Erickson Roofing as I was 20 years ago. Nothing less than 5 stars.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Our relationship with Byron Gallant has been one of trust, integrity, and sincere follow-through on all matters concerning the building of our home. Work was done in an orderly manner and with care to minimize disruption in our lives (we had a bathroom renovation and exterior doors done on two different projects) they completed great work on both projects. I'd be lucky to have them do more work when we need it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sheena Eaton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWguxd5bh5JN1iDk9cn0zAAtcPPsxa3Fo4vEV4Uj_R-8o7QEjtgoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are very pleased with our new custom home built by B Gallant Homes.

The quality of craftsmanship and attention to detail throughout our home stands out. Every aspect, from the major structural elements to the smallest finishing touches, reflects a commitment to excellence. We were particularly impressed that the project was completed on time and on budget.

Any conflicts or minor issues that arose during the build were handled professionally by Byron and his team. Everyone was approachable and listened attentively to our questions and concerns. We also greatly appreciated their openness to our heavy involvement in the process; they genuinely valued our input and made us feel like true partners in building our dream home.

Finally, a special mention must go to all the subcontractors. Every single person who worked on our home was friendly, tidy, respectful, and did excellent work.

We would recommend B Gallant Homes to anyone looking for a custom home builder who delivers on quality, professionalism, and client satisfaction.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daryl Bowman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzNJe6GYt_H-TbHk5Vm4mvKUiPU8rTs_003iYgWwj5nZhIlVb4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Interesting to note I posted my initial review two years ago and it was only replied to a week ago.
As for what individuals put on the internet, be it good or bad, I have as much control over that as you do Byron.
The pictures don't lie, you and I both know how you chose to handle this entire situation.
As I've recently been advised, there are lots of good contractors out there. To anyone reading this, you are welcome to contact me as others have. I will show you the renovation work done to my home so you can make an informed decision.

UPDATE: After meeting with Byron to discuss what needed to be done to properly fix our kitchen. Byron's only focus was to do a quick fix on the wall behind our fridge. It then took Byron over two months to get an email back to me as he wouldn't return emails or my phone call. He still won't address the lighting placement mistakes and other unfinished work that his crew left behind. To top it off in his final email he wanted to charge us for fixing the mistakes by his crew. Byron has been nothing but  unprofessional and disrespectful towards both my wife and I up to this point. It's safe to say that I  do not recommend this company at all.  (Gallant has also blacked out my screenshots of emails that tell the truth of their mistakes, you can see them on my "yelp" review)

Lack of accountability and poor customer service.  Most of the renovations done by B.Gallant to my home were satisfactory.  Unfortunately any issues or problems that my wife and I found in their work were quickly dismissed by Ken their foreman in charge of the project . We had Steve one of the owners come by to look at the work and expected some resolutions to the above mentioned issues. This was well over six months ago, to date we still have never heard anything back from Steve.  Byron, the main owner of B.Gallant was finally able to come by to check on the project. Byron was able to address and fix a few of the smaller issues but there is still the outstanding issue to do with our kitchen.  Decisions and mistakes on our kitchen were made by the tradespeople and nothing was ever mentioned to my wife and I about it. This ended up costing us more money and we now have a kitchen that is not done as it was originally designed. Due to the total cost of properly fixing the kitchen, we were offered by Byron that they make some small changes to make do. My wife and I still found these suggested changes to be unsatisfactory. What is required to properly fix the issue is a new fridge as the original fridge we purchased wouldn't fit properly because of the above mentioned mistakes. A full overhaul of the installed cabinets, countertops, lighting and island as the lighting was installed in the wrong place causing the above mentioned items to be cut and installed in the wrong places. Until such time as B.Gallant can come to terms and fix our kitchen properly we will never be doing business with them again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDM6KzUxgE&fid=0x0:0xa099c670b25a5247"],"When":"2019-12-15"},{"Name":"Susie Bujold","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImDBl-wetQ6MQ99rUaKLLfSypiH0Ns5-V8_KZ1tDm4rzTo8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My bathroom reno is beautiful.  The Gallant team was great to work with and John went above & beyond to ensure that I was happy with the end result.  Recommendation enthusiastically given!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paulette McCarthy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJdE2pRUzMcaQNhKsDG6SLcHsNStq1vR0hhLj_EQX6I4kL3gQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"B. Gallant Homes was wonderful to work with from start to finish. This "close knit" company was sensitive to all of our needs including needs we didn't know we even needed.

The crews were easy to work with, the project manager very attentive, site prep and clean up each day was amazing. Loved the light at night for the porta potty!

Thank you for making our major bathroom renovation so easy to live through.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We met with a few builders, and I can’t imagine having gone with anyone else. Everything was clear and upfront from the beginning. All of our questions were answered in such a helpful manner. We were first timers and we couldn’t have asked for a better experience! Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChiqDVnQE&fid=0x0:0x54e6634e2c172070"],"When":"2023-2-9"},{"Name":"Jennifer Hillier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLs-UqPium4FIhMLEs2shZfLj-qhDVzSmHWdk4p8AatibgaUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Most homeowners have a renovation story. This one has a happy ending. For context, our reno was all interior and mostly cosmetic, but extensive. We updated every surface of the home including a redesigned kitchen and primary bathroom and added several architectural details.
Reno’s take time and usually run over budget.  It’s impossible to know all the challenges you will face until you see what’s behind the walls, ceiling and floors. Add to this, the challenge of getting the trades you need, precisely when you need them. While  not easy to manage, as home owners we still expect good quality workmanship completed in a timely manner.
Our project turned out beautifully with Alair Homes.  Yes, it took extra time to complete but there were contributing factors including changes to the scope by us. From start to finish we had strong confidence in the people and process of Alair.  Stu Hopewell and his team have a talented network of subtrades. They kept an open and honest dialogue with us throughout the project.  The Alair process includes real-time access to the project spend and transparent view of each sub trade and supplier invoice which provided further comfort.  Alair also took full accountability when a couple things didn’t go as promised and were very reasonable in resolving them to our satisfaction.
No renovation or contractor is perfect but this is our 5th major Reno and we can confidently say Alair has been one of the best.
It comes down to the people. Stu and his team are skilled and trustworthy - the two most critical requirements for any home renovation project. If you are considering a Reno, we highly recommend Alair.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDL8-quCA&fid=0x0:0x54e6634e2c172070"],"When":"2024-6-30"},{"Name":"Bill MacGougan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJBabQDClluK_ZWJBF-mwjyX2ajpLbTQXOkoM6erMBGgDBRuts=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would recommend Alair. We had a new deck built and timber frame structure, re and re siding (vinyl to Hardie), and a bunch of smaller things. It was not perfect and took a long time but almost all of that was out of Alair’s control and they handled it all very well. When they made an error, they did not hesitate to take responsibility and address it. I think it was a challenging job - but the final product is excellent.
Effective communications from start to finish and a steadfast commitment to understand and deliver what we wanted. Thank you Trevor (and Chris et al).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1nO6KHQ&fid=0x0:0x54e6634e2c172070"],"When":"2023-12-25"},{"Name":"Norma Oshynko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrVDVg7o4pJRkwNVJm-gpfKsF5Ve51AoxsGnT69Bp1fFG30Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have had a great experience with Alair. Working with Alair was a great experience and I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"shirley mcdonald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLp9j9rQuLWWsOHWDO_Qiy_b9Mlz5Pxj5Cnkl3nWscH9gZ-dg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We met with Stu Hopewell to discuss building a new home. [{"Name":"Kane S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVewrDykV5j0nvjPGMfzp1ngfEf-MfFp1lVR7Rn8TgTtbm7P3tM2w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am writing to express my positive experience with Kangaroo Contracting. They have completed several fencing projects in my neighbourhood over the past few years, and we recently hired them to replace our fence, which included the removal of the old fence and numerous posts.

The crew was courteous, professional, and punctual. They efficiently removed the old fencing, which was a challenging task due to a 20-year-old hedge that had grown through the old lattice work. Despite the difficulty, they persevered and completed the removal thoroughly.

All the work was executed exceptionally well, on time, and within budget. There were no issues, and communication from the entire crew was excellent throughout the process.

Congratulations and thank you to your entire team","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Donna Flett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWZdB0bF3KXmEbliY9HumLR63a-t3Fl-5IwPqthoedGvu1cQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have had Hank from Aarsen Gutters install my gutters and downspouts, and for my renovations for years at my larger house. When I moved to my now much smaller house, I had a serious problem with the gutters on my garage and did not bother to call anyone other than Aarsen Gutters.

The garage gutter problem at my new house was a an issue of drainage, and given the recent rainstorms through Nanaimo recently, an important issue to resolve. The previous owners had used chains and rainbarrels as the drainage method, one gutter was angled incorrectly and drained to the wrong end, and so the water overflowed the barrels and ran in a deluge right along the foundation of the garage and in downpours on one side, right into a small adjoining garden shed.

Hank is still working with his original company, Aarsen Gutters, but Aarsen Gutters now has a new owner. Greg came out to assess the situation, and suggested a pragmatic solution that used most of the materials on site, but fixed the problems. His team came out within one week of me hiring him, and the job was terrifically well done, and done efficiently. Shortly after his team left, I noted a small tweak (not with drainage, but with my personal choice in alignment). Greg came within about an hour of receiving my message, and cheerfully dealt with that. That's service!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Therese Watson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0iF1N--cc2RxM6E7PAzqdiwdwUygNV77wCku-ai7EMyjWEw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Greg come over to see the eavestrough situation on my house, they were so unleveled that I had a waterfall over my garage and one in the back over my patio. I am extremely happy with the work done on my house and the workers were very efficient and polite. It is all perfectly aligned also with new high flow downspouts and leaf covers over the gutters. Last night and this morning has been very windy and raining pretty hard. I am very pleased to see no more waterfalls off my gutters! Thank you for a job well done!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Adam Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTx28NBgRl1kYF05S9iTlA7jDOSSS8UnOUD8Mzz_P_SwnVqA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Michel did an awesome job with our place! We have a house from the 1950s and it looks brand new after he was done! He repaired a bunch of water damage, found where mice were sneaking into our basement and did many minor repairs along the way. He really went above and beyond. Plus he has a cool fire truck for his work.

Bernie was great to work with during the initial planning phase. He responded quickly, answered our questions thoroughly and helped guide us throughout the planning process.

Don’t hesitate to trust this company with your projects.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCJqVuVAiOMtDWee2NVVt1M&fid=0x0:0x4f548faa441a97aa"],"When":"2025-8-4"},{"Name":"Tara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpOAra5Mn_aSOl4ymYMUdw4c55Lss3g7Od7f0c4cRqc1CMjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ravenwood did an amazing job on our siding and gutter reno, tearing off old stucco and putting up new Hardie. The house looks amazing, things have held up perfectly almost a year later, they kept to their quoted price, and they were lovely people to work with.

The owner, Greg, was very responsive by phone or email, both in doing the quote and throughout the job. He stopped by a number of times to check on how things were going. In instances where the cost went above the detailed quote, Ravenwood stuck to the quote (eg ended up needing 2 disposal bins but charged me for the 1 they’d quoted). In cases where additional work was required (eg rot under the siding that they’d warned me was there but couldn’t quote on until they’d taken the old siding off to see how bad it was), the crew onsite showed me the problem and explained the different options for what could be done. Knowing we were trying to keep costs down, they also did an amazing job sourcing some materials (eg finding a gorgeous window on clearance).

I never felt talked down to by any of the crew, even when I had questions I knew were basic or when I didn’t even know the right words to ask the questions. Greg and Josh were excellent at explaining the work they were doing, what my different choices were, and making suggestions when I wasn’t sure what would look good. They were unfailingly careful and kind with my young kids and answered their many questions as well.

The job Rob did installing the siding was perfect. Because of my kids’ interest, we watched a fair bit of the work happening, and he did a meticulous job measuring and levelling, down to things like touching up any nicks on the siding or sealing edges… the craftsmanship is amazing. Because it was a renovation to a 40 year old house, there were a couple places where he had to get creative to work with the existing structure, but he did a completely seamless job and even smoothed out some odd choices from the original build. I never imagined this house could look this good.

They were extremely conscientious about keeping dust down when I explained that our kid has asthma. After tearing off the old stucco, I’m pretty sure they vacuumed our window screens or something – they were cleaner than when the job started. This is just one example of many where they just did a really careful and thorough job. They kept the job site very tidy and hazard-free for kids the entire time they were working.

I would recommend this company to any friend, and would absolutely use them again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC8xtjoWQ&fid=0x0:0x4f548faa441a97aa"],"When":"2020-7-4"},{"Name":"Pat W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ3-Ojm4FCo87a8J61vc4yJkHTbDD06IZFs8ufFWPvf96Z-1w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I'm disappointed to say that if I could give Ravenwood zero stars, I would.  My husband, a retired realtor, said they had an excellent reputation and their reviews support that.  So maybe their work is good but I wouldn't know because when I phoned and talked to Barry (?) he said he'd come by at 2 - 2:30 that afternoon to take a look at our project.  Two days later, he's a no-show and hasn't responded to my email saying that I understand stuff happens in the trades but I'd appreciate a phone call or email to let me know, and can we reschedule?  Guess they don't want our business.  VERY disappointing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Skellivision","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhVCa255iNFCoA9fP4cP0NY9lPCrI64M_w5tOWkfpJIQ7nuuM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We built a house and our contractor, Emperor Innovations, instructed these guys to do the hardi plank , soffits and gutters. What a great work ethic they had! Josh particularly had amazing attention to detail and communication.They were happy, professional, did the most fantastic job of the exterior of our house AND came in on budget post COVID, which was amazing. Of all the trades that worked on our house they were one of the best. We would recommend them to anyone who is looking for a good crew in this area.
We were very happy with the result! Thanks guys! Chris and Lisa Burness","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1iaqvJg&fid=0x0:0x4f548faa441a97aa"],"When":"2023-12-31"},{"Name":"Bruce Gordon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfmPpYbOCspQoWPq8np-biYMNGCs4FzYRun0azv5JxYmlRkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We just had the vinyl siding replaced on our home here in Port Alberni. The people that Greg sent us did a magnificent job replacing the old siding and bring it up to code, as the house is 39 years old and so was the siding. Not only did these fine men do an impressive job with meticulous detail taken, but they worked at a steady pace to complete the work.

The quality of their work is impressive and so is their workmanship. In a world of not being sure who to trust, these people went above and beyond to make a difference. My wife and I couldn't be more pleased. I decided to write a comment here for those of you who undertake an expensive project like renovating the exterior of your home and want to be sure that the money spent, is spent wisely. That's crucial.

Ravenwood Exteriors are your go-to people in our opinion. Trust is everything when doing business with people you don't know. Greg's team of men did an outstanding job, and we felt it was important to give credit where credit is due.

Thank you so much for restoring our faith in humanity. You are in good hands with Josh and his team. Michel, who installed the siding also deserves a shout-out. He's meticulous and has a great sense of humour. He takes pride in what he does and  wants to make the client happy. That is vitally important to any business. Thanks guys!!!!

Bruce & Mabel from Port Alberni

It's now 2025. I left 4 messages for someone to call me back concerning a significant problem with my siding, but nobody called me back. What a precious waste of time and energy. Nobody likes to be ignored, especially when a great deal of money is invested into having our siding done and done correctly. And stand up over a long time, instead of serious deficient workmanship in under 5 years.

I decided to call my insurance broker, and they sent a restoration company to examine the issue. I was told that the siding was not installed properly, which resulted in the vinyl siding buckling and twisting. They took pictures and sent their report to my insurance people. The entire wall of that side of the house had to be replaced, and a section of the front of our home as well.

That news upset both my wife and me. My expertise doesn't include the dos and don'ts of installing vinyl siding. It was clearly obvious that the worker from Ravenwood had no clue what he was doing, according to the insurance people and the restoration people. They educated me on what they did wrong.

I was pretty upset, who wouldn't be. I decided to leave my original
post up and give them one star for not returning my calls after my attempts to get things sorted out. It's one thing to do the work, but it's entirely another thing not standing behind their work and their obligation to fix a problem. The insurance company fixed the issue, and it's guarantee. I would suggest to look elsewhere when you decide to have work done. Ask your insurance broker if the company doing your siding is a preferred vendor; if not, then look elsewhere. Tell them you want to see a written guarantee if something goes wrong and fix it in a timely manner to save yourself a lot of headaches and stress. Ravenwood, read it and weep. I rescind my original rating for all the trouble you caused my wife and me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Melissa-Ann Eckert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXCVkACPtVqkBl6zNiclc76idaz9LGkkR8pdrE7hFWZyoE_DL0fA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The siding guys did a great job, they were happy and working fast and skillfully. Unfortunately it was a very different story for the gutter man they sent out. He did a terrible job, had a bad attitude and would not listen. We are still have problems 😔 with our gutters and water pouring out all over the sides of the house. When we called them about it they never got back to us. We hired Ravenwood privately. They were recommended to us by Pheasant Hill Homes, it was bad advice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karen Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5vtsR-PA1UBzP9JiGGy5LpTVCPTaUeHYDP7mHhlClBkZV8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's not often that a company exceeds our expectations in every area. We hired Ravenwood to do the Hardy siding and T&G pine soffits of our 6600 ft2 custom house build. The job was priced fairly and the owner was very easy to talk to about the different ideas we had. There was a lot of detail and forethought put into our job while the crew worked on the house. The crew went over and above in their detail around taps, doorbells, and fixtures and the soffit angles. Josh, the crew supervisor, put a lot of forethought into every challenge and knew the building code well. He was a good listener and considered our input in every aspect. He made suggestions but had no problem if we didn’t take them. The whole crew was friendly, polite and respectful of our property and cleaned up each evening. As far as the job went, they did an AMAZING job and the attention to detail is what you would expect only of finishing carpenters.
Very high- end, custom work! I would give them 6 stars if I could.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karren Kossey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9DJQD-X3AbO1PNNHq8mXOGzoDmv_8kRP5WQzwedqQD0UQRjhg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Ravenwood Exteriors to complete siding, soffits and gutters on our new house on Gabriola.  I have never seen such a meticulous crew who takes pride in their work.  Absolute pleasure dealing with this company.  On time, on budget and gorgeous end product!  Thank you!!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

He genuinely cares about the details and takes pride in making sure everything is done properly. As an excavation crew, that level of professionalism makes a big difference. It’s always a pleasure being involved in his builds.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"C Schneider","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWh1J3xyTYdJHBGmpcyzzvm6aFiUmR7oCYScjMghBgur73EY8Btkw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Joey and his team were great to work with. They built us a beautiful pergola deck and we are still very happy with it two years later. Our original design had to be tweaked and we could not be happier with their changes. I highly recommend them for their professionalism, integrity and expertise.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jill Dee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLNEF-RDXxuRmTFGazJkBrfuA8XEd_nSxBuN-1AGWGdiJdhZw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I wish I could leave ZERO stars! At our 2nd meeting in May 2025, Joey arrived with a contract and a request for a $5,000 deposit without having previously mentioned either. My bank would only allow an etransfer of $3,000 so that’s what he got.

He took measurements for kitchen cabinets and vanities. Two weeks later, the first cabinet design was received but was missing the pantry units I’d requested. Joey told me that couldn’t be done as they were “custom” which seemed odd to me as they are very similar in size to the existing pantry units sold by the company.

I then received an updated kitchen design but they’d moved my stove, dishwasher and sink. I asked him how that could happen and he said it usually takes about a dozen renditions to get the design correct – hard to believe!

I contacted the cabinet co. to get the design right. When I got in contact with the designer, she asked about the plan she’d done on June 10, however, Joey never sent that one to me.  So here it was a month later and I was just learning about it. She also stated “I am working with Joey Hansen for several kitchen plans” which I found concerning.  My pantry units were definitely doable and the design was finalized in less than 48hours.

I had to request window, electrical and plumbing quotes but only got the window one. He then ghosted me and wouldn’t reply for 5 weeks so I requested a refund of the unspent part of my deposit which was $1600. No reply or refund in a week so I told him I would leave negative reviews everywhere I could. Three days later, still no reply so I told him he had until the following morning to refund the money or I would lodge a complaint with the BBB and leave negative reviews all over Facebook. The money was refunded that night.

Joey wasted my money, my time and my opportunity - he knew I’d wanted to get the reno done during the summer while my 4 dogs and I could be outside and out of the way. I stated the foregoing to him and told him that I really should have gotten all my money back as he was the one to pull the plug and not me. Had I been the one to back out, of course, I would not have expected to receive any money back as it would have been my fault. But not the case here!  Anyway, he gave me $500 more back but I still ended up wasting $900 of my money on him.  He told me if I wanted any more, I would have to go before the civil resolution tribunal.  I’m really, really glad I never gave him the $5,000 he’d wanted!

In the end, Joey said the contract allowed for either party to end the contract and that is what he did.  But he didn’t even have the decency to tell me that and instead just ghosted me until I got fed up and angry and asked for my money back! Is that how a reputable contractor does business???  He is not an ethical person and I am certain had it not been for the potential of negative reviews everywhere hanging over his head, I never would have seen a cent returned!

I have concluded that he most likely didn’t intend to ever do the reno and quite likely is stringing people like me along and cherry-picking which job pays the most and is the most high-profile. And as result of what he did, I am stuck until next summer.  PS – he’s a tiler who got into general contracting!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julien Prevost","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWT-9n8HYx7YX-oldLjwp0ut5t_aHmjotKTypQS5p9fmRB3uouG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great contractor to deal with in Nanaimo.  I have personally used them for a renovation and have also had clients pleased with the work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ken witala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLTMTHbVj2aNESs_VPiHbaYHaV9MKRvBodQZfzH1uwSHesn6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Would not hesitate to contact Joey at ArcRom Contracting for any renovations that need to be done. title: RECOVERY ROOFING
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mark Foster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_SMu7uC7EFavNEwN-bkJgHGuuevFtgNCS7wM_u10AAljbIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5 STARS!!!! I couldn’t be more impressed with the work Mitch from Recovery Roofing did on my home. His attention to detail is on a completely different level, and it shows in every part of the job. Mitch doesn’t just “install a roof”—he builds it to last. He future-proofs against shingle failure by making sure every vent and flashing is protected, with no seams and no nails placed too close to those vulnerable areas. He even adjusts the stagger so each flashing and vent is fully covered by a complete shingle, not a cut piece.
In all the high water-flow areas, he sealed every fastener with Geocel 4500, and ensured there are zero seams in any of the problematic spots other roofs typically fail. He also reinstalled our bathroom exhaust pipes correctly with higher-quality materials and better tape—something no previous roofer had bothered to do. There are no exposed fasteners anywhere except the self-sealing rubber-grommet screws, and he even hand-crafted custom folded flashings to make sure water is directed exactly where it should go.
It’s rare to find someone who takes this level of pride in their workmanship. If you want a roof done right, done once, and built to outlast the shingles themselves, Mitch is the guy you want on your roof. Absolutely five stars.
Thank you Mitch for all your hard work","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxegKF3wSRbPxTAHa2QtfB&fid=0x0:0x337901a930153f8c"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"Melissa Hall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIK4yy3a9HuihOYWapMA-cuhFzXmVmsNU3gR4cBda6c9m80Zg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just had Recovery Roofing do our roof.  It was on schedule and on budget, and that's impressive in this day and age.  The owner communicated well with us ensuring we knew in advance the schedule and what to expect. Cory came to our home on short notice and was very kind and professional. He did such an excellent job explaining everything and was very thorough in his assessment. Thankfully, we actually didn't have any vermiculite in our home, and I feel 100% relieved that we had it looked at. If we were to ever require another assessment and/or services I wouldn't hesitate to call Cory back and highly recommend A-1.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Monika Hajsky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGFC-nw1NoGg_mkoRgzJsBNQfAUwcHX7mHsrAmgxnX8emY199A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Honestly, I never write reviews but this business 100% deserves one.
I recently required removal (basically full gut) of asbestos for a renovation of a suite in my new home. The notice that I needed to remove it came at a bad time in my life both financially and emotionally. I felt defeated and scared due to already completing some work on my own. I knew that asbestos removal is a big ticket item but it was something that needed to be done to move forward, so I felt backed into a corner and didn’t know what to do.
In comes A1 Abatement. I called Cory and explained my situation and he was here the next morning. He was kind, empathetic, and professional. Instead of being all business and ignoring my situation, he listened and met me where I was at. He was open, explaining exactly how the process works and what to expect, and was honest about where costs could be lowered. Cory was outstanding with how he handled my situation, making things work for me and my budget. The project actually ended up taking longer than anticipated, with unexpected hurdles he had to work with (like me sheepishly learning that there’s more to remove). Regardless, he kept to his integrity and professional demeanour throughout the whole project, continuing to keep within range of his quote. I can’t be more grateful to his team for working so hard in all the PPE they use. I would highly recommend anyone to hire Cory at A1 abatement, or call even if you just have questions. I would also inquire about his other sides gigs, like coating your driveways or roofing to last longer - he mentioned it to me and I wouldn’t think twice about hiring him for those! I’ll definitely be hiring him again in the future now that I know any renovation I do likely contains asbestos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stark Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyYIZck-DljYxMiAi8YwsxdqyAr_BkSWK9_QYJ3SbPgSW6Yw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm beyond satisfied with the work! I'd rate them 10 out of 5 stars without hesitation. I highly recommend A-1 Abatement for their exceptional service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ina Powell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdBz5d9id5N1u1xKZFZV57s7wCdtd8aEb9EfnTaYaS4wo0oA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Handled our small abatement issue quickly and professionally. She was friendly, very knowledgeable and she helped me brainstorm new solutions to some problems I was having and gave me some very practical advice.  Thank you, Wendy!  You saved me so much time and energy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mari V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXmmfI6-vwTAN4lfV_Pq6OFnXQM01QE4Xmsm3CWktNYMzHug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I guess your contractor business must be good because your retail customer service sucks.  Windsor Plywood, Home Hardware and Home Depot have you beat hands down.
I went in today about 3 pm looking to find paver stones to match or come close to the sample I brought in because my landscaper thought you might carry them.
I went to the Customer Service desk to ask and what I got was “I don’t know, you have to go back in the yard and look.  All the way at the back.”  And let me add there were no other customers in there store that I could see and the parking lot was pretty empty.
Well, the yard is pretty big and never having been there before the “back” could be multiple places. I went one direction, no luck. So I went that shed attached to the store and asked that guy.  Again same answer, and again no customers.
The sales clerk was great, she’s the only keeper.
Slegg will be my last choice from now on, and recommending friends to do the same.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Green","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKXZS-a7x0nVxhpMfQARtum1d1nX_p9YqqJUulsQ4a2qFxSFg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently placed a large order with Slegg Nanaimo, and had an awesome experience. Good prices, Kristen was very helpful and knowledgeable. Had everything I needed. A difficult delivery was handled expertly. I can’t think of a reason whatsoever to visit the orange place down the road again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Eagin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXK53EroQJJtMFlJnP0yeQoX74yorbq0lOXcsxECCYYDqKflG2JCw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Called in a large order my contractor needed the next day and Krissy was amazing. She made pickup effortless, had items bagged up and ready. She walked me to where I needed to go for the specific lumber and parts. Much appreciated, since I came by ferry and was on a short timeline. I'll be ordering from SLEGG again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Vukobrat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkdI-gLvevaJ-8jYtykMUKWtQ6xxkDUHC2k87BberIY04KE3U=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently bought a package from Slegg in Nanaimo containing an air compressor, brad nailer and air hose, so I could install new baseboards in our home and my daughter's home.  When I got home and tried to assemble everything together, I discovered I was in need of an adapter for the air hose to connect it to the compressor.  I decided to take the whole works back to Slegg just to make sure that an adapter would work.  The first contact person was a cashier - Krissy Saunders - she was very helpful in coming up with the right adapter to fit the hose to the compressor, but she then asked me if I had considered a battery powered brad nailer - no compressor or hose is needed.  I was not aware these were even available so Krissy showed me a brad nailer made by Milwakee.  Turns out I have battery powered Milwakee tools and they are great - Krissy assured me the batteries in my tools would operate the Milwakee nailer, and that it was very reliable and easy to use, without the hassle of dragging around a compressor with an air hose going to the brad nailer.  The Milwakee product without the battery, was slightly cheaper than the compressor, hose and nailer, so I was willing to return the package for a refund and buy the battery powered product.  Krissy looked on her promotions list and saw that this product was on sale last week, but the sale was over.  She was still able to get me the sale price though, which was amazing.

I used the nailer as soon as I got home, and Krissy was right on all counts.  The product performed beautifully!

Thank you Krissy for solving my problem and getting me an even better product!

Cheers, Mark Vukobrat
Nanoose Bay, B.C.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Robert Bain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWmbyeQU1KxfVLfhOyQeksKRG0fOs7e-Q4N01TjUC7EWFXG7nC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5 Stars for PURAIR Nanaimo!

I booked PURAIR for a full furnace duct cleaning and dryer vent cleaning after meeting their team at the Nanaimo Home Show. My appointment window was between noon and 1:00 pm, but the technician didn’t arrive until about 3:15. He called ahead to let me know he was running behind on a previous job - much appreciated! My only concern was that he might feel rushed, but that couldn’t have been further from the case.

Mason was the technician, and he was terrific. He arrived wearing booties, took great care protecting floors and furniture, and was respectful throughout the entire visit. He worked steadily until the job was done - no shortcuts, no rushing - and wrapped up around 6:15, leaving everything clean and tidy before heading out. One of the photos shows what came out of the dryer vent (scary) but Mason even cleaned up this mess on the ground. Mason is truly an asset to this company.

As for PURAIR itself, the #1 reason I chose them was because they’re BBB Accredited - to me, that’s the sign of a better business. The #2 reason was meeting their team in person at the home show and being able to talk through their process and approach to indoor air quality.

Well done, PURAIR Nanaimo!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAee5-lNmP_P5LU-6Kj4NLI&fid=0x0:0x69472300ba27cb54"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"J David Mathews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJsSMedFIryS9qPGOxVDPaaLYQil2C3-1TB6-QkFN3lS2SdhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Andy Biro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImeCQTXfZajuTedfR4yP0ITRz8tT2ZsDukYwQkWrh9P-4n5IQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I only wish that all trades were as good.  Neil came quickly for the estimate, on time, as agreed.  He quoted a great price and installed the promised metal roofing within days!  Neil's work is outstanding.  Good, quality product and installation.  He finished within days, left a clean site and there were no surprises.  Thanks Neil.  Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Peter K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXnN88wx-8hczFk1WPWn1H5R5fa6CzD0kHtwJj7xw3c61LjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Neil at Synergy Metal Roofing replace my roof 7 months ago. He installed a black standing seam metal roof that looks fantastic. The quality of the roof is outstanding, the flashing is all perfect and the roof is beautiful. It looks much better than the old asphalt shingle roof and I am sure it has added value to my house that is greater than the cost of the roof.

Synergy installed a metal drip edge and folded the end of every roof panel around it so the end of the panel is secured to the house. The end of each seam is also covered. This method looks better than other installations I have looked at and it will extend the life of the roof by preventing water from getting under the panels. Synergy closed up my roof vents and installed ridge venting along my entire roof peak. The roof ventilation is much better now. Synergy also installed two snow dams,  which worked very well with the large snow falls over this last winter. My neighbours roof only has one snow dam and the snow bent his plumbing vents as it slid down his roof.

When the job was done Neil left my yard nice and clean and even hauled away some items to the dump for me. He cleaned my gutters while he was up there, and also took care not to damage them with his ladders.

This is the last roof I will ever need and as a bonus I will never have moss and I should never have to go on my roof again.

I highly recommend his work. It is exceptional!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Gray","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxQ53QCSYOjagnmenhhpihH2gbhbNwd0q6JC25SQ5apB4zjwwW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Neil made the roof for our carriage house roof earlier this year and did an excellent job.
